title: CNCI Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Project Assistant Posts
description: The Chittaranjan National Cancer Institute (CNCI) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancy for 01 Project Assistant. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed any degree or post-graduation can apply for the CNCI Notification 2026 . Interested applicants can apply in offline mode.
